goal: Exercise queue/cancel/confirm/external-failure states to prove principal remains withdrawable.
setup_requirements: mock external wrapper failure or system settlement
minimal_state: user has principal deposited through wrapper or queued withdrawal
external integration can fail or special state can be triggered
attacker_actions: fail reward/external integration or change special state
inspect all balances and pending queues
assertions: principal can exit or explicit pause explains block
no accounting bucket keeps assets permanently unavailable
common_failures: not distinguishing rewards blocked from principal blocked
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
